name: Harel Ringel
title: Project Manager
profile: Experienced Project Manager with a focus on data-driven decision making and process automation. Skilled in managing multiple projects under pressure while motivating teams to deliver excellent results. Strong technical background in Python, SQL, and automation tools. Committed to continuous improvement and efficiency, following the principle that if something is worth doing, it's worth doing excellently. Master in prioritizing – Less is More.

experience.title: Project Manager
achievements: Increased total service hours by automating launch and delivery processes and creating a reusable procedure and main repository, contributing to a significant revenue boost.
Developed a customized project management platform using Excel VBA and JS, optimizing project allocation and enhancing overall team efficiency.
Standardized and modernized project launch methods, saving over 2 hours per project.

experience.title: Data Analyst
achievements: Built databases and created dashboards for BI purposes, providing actionable insights that informed strategic decisions.
Developed tools using VBA, SQL, Python, and Excel for automating manual tasks, resulting in a time savings of over 4 hours per week.

experience.title: Deputy company commander in the Armored Corps, Captain (res.)
achievements: Graduated with honors in multiple roles, including Outstanding Battalion and Divisional Outstanding.

social.role: FOA - Monitoring antisemitic content on the Internet
